content.en:
Under absolute power, there is no point in any killing array.

Seeing that the killing array was broken, the Dao Void Demons no longer hesitated, and directly killed the large army.

The eightfold Dao Realm stared at Ye Tian and came across the void, wanting to kill Ye Tian.

"You go and deal with the other Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realms, and this Eightfold Supreme Dao Realm will be handed over to me!"

Ye Tian said.

"Yes!"

The Taisu Palace Lord and the others of the Sevenfold Dao Realm responded to the Dao.

Thundered!!!!

The two armies collided together, like a meat grinder.

Every moment, there is the fall of the Dao Realm.

And Ye Tian fought with that Eightfold Supreme Dao Void Demon.

This eightfold Supreme Dao Void Demon is not weak, and the sixth sequence of Supreme Dao rules he has comprehended has also reached the seventy percent realm, and his cultivation has reached the peak realm of the eightfold Supreme Dao Void Demon, which belongs to the top eightfold Supreme Dao Void Demon.

Even if the Taibai Sword Lord came, he was not the opponent of this Eightfold Supreme Dao Void Demon.

But in Ye Tian's eyes, such an eightfold supreme Dao Void Demon could be suppressed with a wave of his hand.

"Extreme Spear Technique!"

Although this is only the perfection of the sixth sequence of supreme rules, with the blessing of the fifth sequence of supreme rules, the power of this shot is extremely terrifying.

"Kill!"

One shot broke through everything, and the defense of the Eightfold Supreme Dao Void Demon was like paper paste, which was directly penetrated by Ye Tian.

Poof!

This eightfold Supreme Dao Void Demon was nailed to the void, and the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule shattered the opponent's body, severely damaging it in an instant.

"Fifth Sequence of Solstice Rule !!!!"

This eightfold Supreme Dao Void Demon was stunned.

Ye Tian was just a sixfold supreme dao realm, even if he was an existence who had taken the path of the strongest supreme dao, it was only comparable to the powerful eightfold supreme dao realm.

He considered a lot of factors so he didn't feel dangerous.

But he never expected that Ye Tian would comprehend the rules of the Fifth Sequence of the Supreme Dao.

It can be said that Ye Tian's strength can be called invincible in the Eightfold Dao Realm!

Burst!

After a breath, this eightfold Supreme Dao Void Demon had already been bombarded and completely fallen.

Immediately afterwards, Ye Tian manipulated the sixth sequence of the Dao Rules to kill those Sevenfold Dao Realms.

"The supreme supernatural power - turning silk!"

This is an application of the Sixth Sequence of Supreme Path Rules.

Puff puff puff!!!

A trace of the Dao rules penetrated through the past, killing a famous seven-fold Dao realm in an instant.

......

The Taisu Palace Master was fighting a Sevenfold Supreme Dao Void Demon, and he was no match at all.

Her seventh sequence of supreme dao rules had also reached more than ninety percent of the realm, but this sevenfold supreme dao void demon bloodline was strong, and her combat power completely crushed her.

At the moment, she was already injured.

But suddenly.

A trace of the Supreme Dao rule penetrated the body of the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Void Demon, and with a slight flick, the body of the Supreme Dao Void Demon was shattered, and it was directly killed in an instant.

Then.

Only then did she notice that it was Ye Tian who had dealt with the Eightfold Supreme Dao Void Demon to help them with these Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realms.

Seeing a Sevenfold Supreme Dao Void Demon die in Ye Tian's hands, he was like an ant, without the slightest power to resist.

The Taisu Palace Master was completely shocked!

"Ye Tian's strength is getting more and more terrifying!"

The Taisu Palace Lord said with emotion.

After that, she went to the Sixfold Path Void Demon.

After all, the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Void Demon was killed by Ye Tian almost instantly.

With her strength, dealing with the Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demon is almost a slaughter, unless it is the kind of Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demon who can fight beyond the level.

But this is just a branch legion of the Heavenly Blood Lineage, and it will not allow such demons who can fight beyond the level here, otherwise it will be too easy to fall.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian shot again and again, and the dense sixth sequence of Supreme Dao rules almost penetrated all over the battlefield, killing a large number of Supreme Dao Void Demons.

To deal with these weak people, he didn't need to use the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule.

Rumble!!!!!!

The dense Supreme Dao Void Demons turned into corpses, and it didn't take long for all the Supreme Dao Void Demons on this battlefield to be wiped out.

Immediately, he reported the situation here to the Su Domain Lord.

Each of the official members of the battle has a trace of incarnation in the Supreme Void, so that they can communicate with each other.

Otherwise, on such a battlefield, any communication or means of communication may be blocked, but the Supreme Void will not be blocked.

"Lord Su Domain, the node I guard, the Dao Void Demon is completely destroyed!"

Ye Tian said.

"Ye Tian, you go to support the thirty-sixth node, the three commanders of the sixteenth node have already fallen, and the other two are about to be unable to support it!"

The thirty-sixth node is not very important, and the location is relatively biased, but there are also three commanders in charge, each of whom is at the peak realm of the sevenfold Dao realm, and the seventh sequence is complete to the Dao rules, and the foundation is relatively strong, and the strength is much stronger than that of the Taisu Palace Master.

However, in the face of the invasion of the Supreme Dao Void Demon, the strength of the three commanders was not worth mentioning.

Like some of the weaker nodes, the strength of the town guard is too weak, and it is possible that it will be destroyed by the Supreme Dao Void Demon in one wave.

......

Node 36.

The two commanders are being besieged by six Sevenfold Supreme Dao Void Demons, these six Sevenfold Supreme Dao Void Demons are all the kind of extremely powerful, ordinary Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm facing them, they can't even carry a move, and they will be killed in seconds.

Before, there were also seven to the Dao realm to assist the two commanders, but they were all killed in seconds, and they were sent to death when they came.

"When will the support arrive?"

The commander made Jian Yu despair.

The other commander didn't know what to say, in this situation, the other nodes of the Winter Night Fortress were also extremely difficult, and there was not necessarily support.

Even the Lord of the Su Domain is estimated to be besieged by many strong people, and he can't come to support.

In every calamity, there are more than one or two fortresses that are broken, and if you are unlucky, the fortress of Winter Night will also be broken.

Burst!!!!

One of the two commanders was careless and was completely severely damaged.

Just when they thought they were going to die, strands of regular silk threads crossed over.

Poof!

A Sevenfold Supreme Dao Void Demon was pierced by the regular silk thread, and his body was directly shattered and died.

The Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm, which was almost impossible for them to compete with, is now dead like this?

"Are the two commanders alright?"

Ye Tian appeared and asked.

"Commander Ye Tian!"

Jian Yu was surprised.

He didn't expect that it was Ye Tian's commander who came to support, and Ye Tian's commander's strength was too terrifying, and the rule silk thread could kill these sevenfold Dao realms in seconds, which was worthy of being a demon who took the road of the strongest to the Dao.

"I'll be fine!"

Jian Yu replied.

Although they had been hit hard, they still had no problem dealing with the ordinary Sevenfold Supreme Dao Void Demon.

"If I help you kill a batch of Sevenfold Supreme Dao Void Demons, I'll have to go to other places to help!

Ye Tianyi waved his hand.

The sixth sequence of the Divine Dao Rule Silk Thread crossed the void and killed a Sevenfold Supreme Dao Void Demon in an instant, and then he immediately went to support other places.

Without these Sevenfold Supreme Dao Void Demons, there would be no pressure at this point.
